title: Onboarding - Permission for location tracking - Don't Allow - Enable now - Ask [Deprecated for IOS]
scenario: Verify location permission flow when user initially denies permission, then later enables it from Find My Device screen on iOS
steps: Start the app for the first time
Select 'Don't Allow' when the location permission dialog appears
Set location permission to 'Ask Next Time or When I Share'
expected: Proper permission dialogs appear at each step with correct options (Allow Once, Allow While Using App, Don't Allow) and appropriate background screen visibility.
